task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access Marcus Tremblay's tax documents from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window open to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\' or a document viewer (like a PDF reader) showing Marcus Tremblay's tax documents.

task_completion.description: Create a 2024 tax return for Marcus Tremblay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax interface displays 'Marcus Tremblay' as the taxpayer in the personal information section for the 2024 tax year.

task_completion.description: Enter data from the tax documents into the StudioTax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax forms within StudioTax (e.g., T4, T2200, or other income/deduction forms) contain populated numerical data rather than being completely blank.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'marcus_tremblay.24t' in the StudioTax documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog confirming the file is being saved as 'marcus_tremblay.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or the StudioTax window title bar showing 'marcus_tremblay.24t' as the active file.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax GUI to complete the return, not a text editor or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing within the actual StudioTax 2024 application interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application and create the output file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal or command prompt windows executing file creation or copy commands to generate 'marcus_tremblay.24t'.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and read the source tax documents to get the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the tax documents being viewed at least once before or during the data entry process in StudioTax.
